rejected.reason: Both ORT modes are 0/265 known-correct: removing output requantization exposes small positive accumulators as false cells.
Resize float16 ROI type mismatch causes 265/265 runtime errors in both ORT modes.
ORT_DISABLE_ALL has 265/265 runtime errors and runtime tracing finds false declarations; default-only success is ineligible.
CastLike-to-Cast saves one parameter but exposes the real 10x10 carrier; actual cost is 876, and nine declared/runtime shape mismatches remain.
